silty, very sandy, pebbly, light olive-gray (5Y 2/1), calcareous; occasional cobbles; rock at 282 feet

fine sand, drilled good, water, gray
with lenses of clay, washed, colored

and very fine to fine sand, clayey, grays and browns, very slightly cohesive to loose, quartzose, subrounded, interbedded, organic
silty with sand grains, pebbles and occasional cobbles, olive gray to dark olive gray, slightly hard, chunky, very tightly compacted, organic or carbonaceous shale blocks (till)
hard, dark brownish black, moderately hard, smooth, brittle, oily, tight
very fine, clayey, dark brown, soft, slightly cohesive, organic, oily, stains
coarse, well sorted, subangular to subrounded, clean, mostly granitics, with carbonates and shale, loose
very fine to fine, silty to clayey, interbedded, moderately soft, chunky and friable to loose, light olive gray

very fine and fine gradually becoming coarser with depth, fine gravel from 260 to 280, gray gradually becoming buff colored, generally subrounded, well sorted and uniform, mostly quartz and granitic derivatives with carbonates, some shale, occasional lignite chips and wood fragments, loose, taking lots of water.  Had run out of bentonite so hole had a tendency to cave, got rods stuck twice, abandoned hole at 280 because of the head and no way to keep it down.
silty, yellowish gray, soft to moderately soft, cohesive, plastic, smooth, sticky, tight, oxidized
silty, olive gray, soft, smooth, cohesive, plastic, sticky, tight
silty to sandy with pebbles, slightly hard, chunky, brittle, olive gray to dark olive gray, very tight, contains layers or blocks of smooth dark clay (till)
very sandy (very fine), very dark brown, soft, slightly cohesive, interbedded with silt and sand, organic
fine to medium, gray, moderately well sorted and uniform, generally subrounded, mostly quartz and shale, some carbonates and a little lignite, loose, clean

fine, varies from silty to medium-grained; sand, gray, loose but so uniform it drills like it is consolidated, generally subrounded, mostly quartz with some carbonates and shale with a little lignite, also shell and wood fragments; taking water
silty, olive gray, soft, cohesive, plastic, smooth, sticky
as above, very fine to fine, interbedded, gray, quartzose with shale, little carbonates and lignite
fine and medium, moderately well sorted and uniform, mostly subrounded, varies from subangular to rounded, clean, shell and wood fragments, taking water
fine, clayey with pebbles and sand with fine gravel lenses, light olive gray, chunky, cohesive but crumbles under pressure, gritty (till)
sandy, as above, more clay with included blocks or layers of pure smooth clay and loose very fine sand; drills tight but easy, no large rocks (till)

dark greenish gray with a shade of olive gray, sandy to silty, same as till from 82-112
fairly well sorted, predominant size 1/2 mm, angular to rounded, mostly quartz with dolomitics, limestone, shales, lignite, becomes coarser downwards

sandy, quartz, dolomite, shale limestone, angular to subrounded, predominant size 1 mm or so, highly calcareous, boulders mixed with it, greenish gray

quartz, dolomite, limstone, shale, lignite, hard cohesive, angular to subrounded, average 1mm, dark greenish gray with a shade of olive gray, till changes to olive gray with a shade of dark greenish gray. somewhat sandy, quartz, dolomite, limestone, lignite, no apparent shale, grain size varies greatly, angular to subrounded, cohesive, soft, plastic, highly calcareous, dark greenish gray with a shade of olive gray

weathered, contains quartz fragments, lignite seams present, cohesive, very soft, plastic, non-calcareous, light brownish gray, yellowish gray and light bluish gray
